style_rules: clean SoFunny mobile-game icon line style
no checkerboard, fake transparency, text, labels, UI, or watermark
identity_features: small thin black glasses placed low over half-lidded eyes when present
small symbolic nose/mouth/teeth, no large muzzle redesign
tail attachment, tail volume, and tail stripe rhythm when the character has a tail
same palette family and line weight

phase_semantics.left_contact_down: left foot reads as planted contact with the body compressed downward
phase_semantics.left_push_off: left leg visibly pushes off while the opposite leg prepares to pass
phase_semantics.flight_passing_left_to_right: legs pass through a readable mid-step flight pose
phase_semantics.right_contact_down: right foot reads as planted contact with the body compressed downward
phase_semantics.right_push_off: right leg visibly pushes off while the opposite leg prepares to pass
phase_semantics.flight_recover_to_left_contact: pose recovers cleanly into the loop back to left contact
phase_semantics.contact_left: left-side contact pose with stable ground contact
phase_semantics.down_left: left-side down/compression phase coupled to foot contact
phase_semantics.passing_left: left-to-right passing phase with leg separation
phase_semantics.contact_right: right-side contact pose with stable ground contact
phase_semantics.down_right: right-side down/compression phase coupled to foot contact
phase_semantics.passing_right: right-to-left passing phase with leg separation
phase_semantics.settle: settle phase without losing identity or tail attachment
phase_semantics.recover: recovery phase that prepares the loop return
phase_semantics.loop_return: final frame connects back to the first contact pose

required_visual_changes: lower-body pose change, not whole-body translation only
body bounce coupled to contact and push-off
tail lag remains attached and fully visible
shadow/contact logic changes with contact and flight
